chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr.B.A.No.S-1024 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on MA 4637/18 2. For orders on MA 4638/18 12.06.2018. Mr. Ashar Majeed Khokhar advocate for applicant/surety. Ms. Ramshan, A.P.G. = 1. Urgency granted. 2. Through M.A.No. 4638/18, applicant / surety seeks return of surety papers. According to learned counsel for the applicant / surety, he stood surety for the applicants Sher Muhammad Rind, Sanaullah and Abdul Jabbar, who have been acquitted by the learned trial Court and now the surety papers are no more required by this Court. Learned APG present in Court in other matters waived notice and has recorded no objection to return of the surety papers. In view of the above, the office is directed to return the surety documents to the applicant/ surety on proper verification and identification. M.A. No. 4638/18 stands disposed of in above terms. JUDGE Ahmed/Pa,
